sections.title: April 2026
sections.description: Birdadette hatches, the command center, reinforcements arrive, and Farm Guardian gets three cameras.

photos.caption: Birdadette on the keyboard moments after hatching — cracked blue eggshell beside her.
Birdadette on the laptop keyboard — day 8. The screen behind her is the Guardian brooder camera, live feed of the Cackle chicks.
The command center — chick brooder, Mac Mini running Guardian, Claude Code on the Dell, Pawel supervising.
Birdadette among the remaining eggs in the incubator — the only one to make it.
One of three White Broad-Breasted turkey poults — first turkeys on the farm.
Reinforcements from Cackle Hatchery — chicks peeking out of their Priority Mail box.
Chicks gathered around the Samsung S7 in the brooder — enrichment programming.
The new Producers Pride Universal Poultry Pen with Guardian solar camera on top.
View from the deck — new coop in the clearing, Connecticut woods behind.
Pawel the Yorkie supervises the brooder while Claude plans the next Guardian update.
The whole flock out in the yard — spring 2026.

sections.title: How We Got Here
sections.description: Years of hand-raising chicks, learning the hard way, and building something real.

photos.caption: Hand-raising day-old chicks — the first batch, brooder on the kitchen counter.
Day-old chicks fresh from the hatchery, warm and confused.
The learning curve: every chick keeper's first week.
Holding a Silkie from the previous flock — fluffier than they look.
Brooder setup from a previous year's acquisition. The warmth lamp, the heat plate, the chaos.
Tilling the main garden plot behind the coop — the chickens follow the tractor row by row.
Birdadonna the day she hatched — April 2, 2025. EE × RIR cross.
